positive: Minimalist stylized forest creature, a sleek otter with an ethereal luminescence, depicted in mid-play amongst stylized bioluminescent foliage and water droplets. The scene should feature strong negative space contrast, clean linework, and a silhouette-focused composition. Dominant colors are deep indigo, forest emerald, and pops of neon aqua glow. Geometric, repeating natural elements create a modern, abstract jungle pattern suitable for repeat printing. Highly detailed vector art style, high contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, screen print quality, octane render, centered composition, studio lighting, perfect symmetry.
